title: Tapeinia pumila

It belongs to the genus Tapeinia, which is a monotypic genus containing only one species. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its habit, leaf morphology, and reproductive features. The Apocynaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants that includes various species of vines, shrubs, and trees.
